scripts.check:main: node -e "const { execSync } = require('node:child_process'); const branch = execSync('git branch --show-current', { encoding: 'utf8' }).trim(); if (branch !== 'main') { console.error('Current branch must be main.'); process.exit(1); }"
scripts.dist:branch: npm run dist:branch:update && git push --force origin dist-only:dist-only
scripts.dist:main: npm run check:main && npm run build && npm run dist:branch
scripts.dist:main:local: npm run check:main && npm run build && npm run dist:branch:local
